title: Guide to Using Chat Groups in SiteFlow
metaTitle: Guide to Using Chat Groups in SiteFlow
metaDescription: Create chat groups in SiteFlow, send messages, attach files, and mention team members with @tags. Covers default system groups including SiteFlow AI and Announcements.
author: SiteFlow Operations Team
body:
Guide to using the Chat Groups module in SiteFlow — creating groups, sending messages, attaching files, and mentioning team members.

Overview

Chat Groups is the built-in team messaging feature in SiteFlow. You can create any number of groups — by project, department, or any other grouping. All company members can be added to groups.

Default system groups:

The Chat Group List

The left panel shows all your groups under Recent Chats. Each row shows the group avatar, group name, description or last message preview, and date of last activity.

Click any group to open the chat.

Creating a New Chat Group

Click the + icon in the Chat Groups header.

Click Create Chat Group.

Groups can be created for any purpose: project teams, departments (HR, Accounts, Site), or cross-project coordination.

Sending Messages

Inside a chat group, click the Enter Message field at the bottom, type your message, and click the Send button or press Enter.

Bottom toolbar icons:

Mentioning a Team Member

To tag someone so they receive a notification:

  1. Type @ in the message field
  2. Start typing the person’s name — a dropdown of matching members appears
  3. Click their name to insert the mention
  4. The mention appears highlighted in the message (e.g. @Ravi)
  5. Send the message

The tagged person receives a notification regardless of whether they have the chat open.

Tips

  • Use descriptive group names and descriptions so team members know the group’s purpose (e.g. “Finance Team” or “NH-15 Site Updates”).
  • Use @mentions to notify specific people rather than sending a general message and hoping the right person sees it.
  • The SiteFlow AI group lets you ask questions about the app directly in chat — useful for quick how-to queries without leaving SiteFlow.
  • Attach documents, photos, or site drawings directly in the chat using the paperclip icon. The file is shared with all group members immediately.

If Something Goes Wrong
